name: Nurikabe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヌリカベ
desc: If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 other Zombie monster in your GY; Special Summon both it and this card, but their effects are negated, also banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Nurikabe" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 other Zombie monster in your GY; Special Summon both it and this card, but their effects are negated, also banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Nurikabe" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY, except the turn it was sent there: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 other Zombie monster in your GY; Special Summon both it and this card, but their effects are negated, also banish them when they leave the field. You can only use this effect of "Nurikabe" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
Banishes cards when they leave the field
